items.title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG move for Arsenal star Martinelli
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain sporting director Luis Campos has held a meeting with the representatives of Arsenal winger Gabriel Martinelli. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: All India Chess Federation aims to host World Chess Championship matches, says Verma
items.summary: Verma said FIDE had initially been open to awarding the event to Tamil Nadu, with full backing from both the All India Chess Federation (AICF) and the State government
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Rahul 'found the boundary every time he needed one' against Hazlewood
items.summary: KL Rahul "came out today with very good intent… he was not calculating too much," Ambati Rayudu says of the 34-ball 57
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
